1.solution: Each ratio |a+b|/(|a|+|b|) ‚ąą [0,1] for non-zero a,b. Among any 3 non-zero reals, at least 2 share sign ‚Üí at least one term=1 ‚Üí sum‚Č•1. Min=1 (e.g. a=b=1,c=‚ąí1: terms=1,0,0). Max=3 (all same sign: all terms=1). Sum of least+greatest=1+3=4.

2.solution: Let u=|k|‚Č•0: u¬≥+8u¬≤+5u‚ąí50. Try u=2: 8+32+10‚ąí50=0 ‚Üí factor (u‚ąí2)(u+5)¬≤=0. Expression>0 iff u>2, ‚Č§0 iff u‚Č§2 (i.e., |k|‚Č§2). Integers not satisfying: k‚ąą{‚ąí2,‚ąí1,0,1,2}=5. Answer: D.

3.solution: x‚Č•1: x¬≤‚ąí5(x‚ąí1)‚ąí1=x¬≤‚ąí5x+4=(x‚ąí1)(x‚ąí4)=0 ‚Üí x=1,4. x<0: x¬≤‚ąí5(1‚ąíx)‚ąí1=x¬≤+5x‚ąí6=(x+6)(x‚ąí1)=0 ‚Üí x=‚ąí6. Sum=1+4+(‚ąí6)=‚ąí1. Not in options {0,1,‚ąí2}. Answer: D (none of these; sum=‚ąí1).

4.solution: Integer pairs: (|x|‚ąí4)(|y|+6)=24 with |x|‚ąí4>0 (since |y|+6‚Č•6>0). Factor pairs (a,b=24/a) with b‚Č•6: (1,24)‚Üí|x|=5,|y|=18‚Üí4 pairs; (2,12)‚Üí|x|=6,|y|=6‚Üí4; (3,8)‚Üí|x|=7,|y|=2‚Üí4; (4,6)‚Üí|x|=8,|y|=0‚Üí2. Total=14. Answer: D.

5.solution: Eq2: x+|y|‚ąíy=50. If y‚Č•0: x=50, Eq1: 100+y=25‚Üíy=‚ąí75 (contradiction). If y<0: x‚ąí2y=50 ...(II). Eq1 with x‚Č•0: 2x+y=25 ...(I). (I)+(II)/2: x=20, y=‚ąí15. Check: x‚Č•0‚úď, y<0‚úď. |x|+|y|=20+15=35. Answer: D.

7.solution: Let u=P‚ąí4‚Č•1 (integer). Expression=|P‚ąí5+9/(P‚ąí4)|=|u‚ąí1+9/u|. For u‚Č•1: u‚ąí1+9/u>0. f(u)=u‚ąí1+9/u. f'(u)=1‚ąí9/u¬≤=0‚Üíu=3 (integer, u>4‚ąí4=1‚úď). f(3)=3‚ąí1+3=5. Minimum=5 at P=7.

8.solution: (|x|+5)/(|x|¬≤+|x|‚ąí6)>0. Let u=|x|‚Č•0. Numerator u+5>0 always. Denominator=(u+3)(u‚ąí2): u+3>0 always; u‚ąí2>0 iff u>2‚Üí|x|>2‚Üíx<‚ąí2 or x>2. Solution=R\[‚ąí2,2]. Answer: B.

10.solution: f(y)=|y|+2|y+1|+3|y+2|+4|y+3|+5|y+4|. Weights 1,2,3,4,5 total 15. Weighted median: cumulative from y=‚ąí4: 5, then 5+4=9‚Č•7.5 ‚Üí minimum at y=‚ąí3. f(‚ąí3)=|‚ąí3|+2√ó2+3√ó1+4√ó0+5√ó1=3+4+3+0+5=15.
